series_metadata.series_title: Special Use Permits and District Permits
series_metadata.series_description: Records used to authorize public meetings and events on state forest property and to provide for waiver of rules as allowed in the Ohio Administrative Code. This series includes recreation permits, meeting permits, and other documentation that doesn't include extensive research or land use.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Keep for one year after the expiration date, then destroy. ; Paper: Keep for one year after the expiration date, then destroy. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
